basic_details.job_title: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad)
basic_details.short_information: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad (MNNIT Allahabad) has released the official Technical Manpower [Computer Application] Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower [Computer Application] Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 45 years of age with a Diploma in Computer Science/ IT, DCA, or a higher relevant qualification, along with the required experience and technical skills, are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 28-07-2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in application

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Computer Science, I.T., DCA or higher degree in relevant discipline
qualification.details: Technical Manpower [Computer Application]: Diploma in Computer Science, I.T., DCA or higher degree in relevant discipline, with 01 year experience in computer applications. Must have basic knowledge of Website Designing, Windows, and Linux systems administration, MySQL, PHP. Essential: Good typing speed in English, Hindi and sound knowledge of MS-Office.

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.motilal_nehru_national_institute_of_tech: Diploma in Computer Science, I.T., DCA or higher degree in relevant discipline

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MNNIT Allahabad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower [Computer Application] Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Technical Manpower [Computer Application]: Diploma in Computer Science, I.T., DCA or higher degree in relevant discipline, with 01 year experience in computer applications. Must have basic knowledge of Website Designing, Windows, and Linux systems administration, MySQL, PHP. Essential: Good typing speed in English, Hindi and sound knowledge of MS-Office.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower [Computer Application] Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: MNNIT Allahabad Technical Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for MNNIT Allahabad Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name is Technical Manpower [Computer Application]. This role is for individuals with a background in computer applications and related fields.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Technical Manpower [Computer Application]?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Technical Manpower [Computer Application] post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Since this is a walk-in recruitment, there is no specific last date for online application. Candidates must attend the walk-in interview on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q5. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 28th July 2026. Candidates should plan their travel accordingly.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Manpower post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Diploma in Computer Science, I.T., DCA or a higher degree in a relevant discipline, along with 01 year of experience in computer applications.

faq.question: Q7. What is the maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Technical Manpower [Computer Application] post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Technical Manpower position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh - 211004.
